task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the 'Create Event' form in SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM web interface showing a blank or partially filled 'Create Event' form.

task_completion.description: Verify the event name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'VIP Executive Dinner 2026' visible in the Event Name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the location and budget are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'The Capital Grille, Chicago' in the Location field and '12500' in the Budget field.

task_completion.description: Verify the start and end dates are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '10/20/2026' visible in both the Start Date and End Date input fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the event record has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail view of the 'VIP Executive Dinner 2026' event, showing the saved record rather than the edit form.

task_completion.description: Verify the required contacts are linked as delegates to the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Contacts or Delegates subpanel on the event detail view showing 'Olivia Sterling', 'Jameson Wright', and 'Elena Rostova' listed as linked records.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SuiteCRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the SuiteCRM web application in a browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent linked existing contacts rather than creating new ones.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of any 'Create Contact' forms in the screenshots; the agent should only use search/selection dialogs to link the existing contacts.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for name, location, budget, and dates appear inside the standard SuiteCRM form fields, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected event name is 'VIP Executive Dinner 2026'. The expected location is 'The Capital Grille, Chicago'. The expected budget is '12500'. The start and end dates must be '10/20/2026'. The delegates to be linked are 'Olivia Sterling', 'Jameson Wright', and 'Elena Rostova'.
